title: scutellaria aurata
intro: Scutellaria aurata, also known as Golden Skullcap, is a perennial flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Asia and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Scutellaria aurata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for a variety of ailments. Scutellaria aurata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
